---
title: "Export GTEx Lung SuSiE Summary Parquet to CSV"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: 72
---

One-off workbook to read the GTEx Lung SuSiE summary parquet and write a
CSV copy into the same folder.

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
here::i_am("vignettes/one_off_validations/export_gtex_lung_susie_summary_to_csv.Rmd")

library(here)
library(arrow)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(knitr)
```

## 1. Inputs

```{r inputs}
input_parquet <- normalizePath(
  file.path(
    here(),
    "..",
    "eQTL_annotations_for_susine",
    "data",
    "gtex",
    "Lung.v10.eQTLs.SuSiE_summary.parquet"
  ),
  winslash = "/",
  mustWork = TRUE
)

output_csv <- file.path(
  dirname(input_parquet),
  sub("\\.parquet$", ".csv", basename(input_parquet))
)

cat("Input parquet:", input_parquet, "\n")
cat("Output csv:", output_csv, "\n")
```

## 2. Read Parquet

```{r read-parquet}
lung_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(input_parquet) %>%
  tibble::as_tibble()

cat("Rows:", nrow(lung_tbl), "\n")
cat("Columns:", ncol(lung_tbl), "\n")
```

## 3. Preview

```{r preview}
kable(head(lung_tbl, 10))
```

## 4. Write CSV

```{r write-csv}
readr::write_csv(lung_tbl, output_csv)

stopifnot(file.exists(output_csv))
file_info <- file.info(output_csv)

cat("Wrote csv:", output_csv, "\n")
cat("CSV size (bytes):", file_info$size[[1]], "\n")
```
